contract_claim: _iter_files accepts a caller-supplied (LLM-provided) glob pattern and passes it directly to self.root.glob() without any root-containment check via _resolve. The docstring itself acknowledges this gap (L183-188), noting it is a V1-4 hardening item. A crafted glob could potentially yield files outside expected boundaries or trigger ReDoS via pathological patterns.
